metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by vdsmon. Each skill ships as its own plugin so you can pick and choose. Plugins prefixed with cc- are Claude-Code-specific (hooks, dynamic context injection, or ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}); unprefixed plugins port cleanly to other SKILL.md-native hosts (OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Goose, Copilot, etc.).

plugins.name: investigate
plugins.description: Investigate a reported error or incident end to end across every reachable system, never inferring past a missing source — stop and raise to the human for access or clarity instead. Builds an access ledger, batch-raises blockers up front, digs wide through logs/state/code/history (any repo), and delivers a root-cause report plus a proposed (unapplied) fix. Claude-Code-leaning (AskUserQuestion + read-only subagents + MCP access ledger); ships a swappable environment access-map reference.

plugins.name: slack-draft
plugins.description: Draft a Slack message for the user to send: Slack mrkdwn, lead-with-conclusion, backticked identifiers and domain values, ASCII punctuation. Defaults to English and a plain high-level register; pass --tech for a code-reading peer. Draft only, never posts. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: skill-polish
plugins.description: Post-mortem for any skill — scans a session for friction and applies concrete edits to the responsible skill file. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: cc-tokenomics
plugins.description: Token usage, cache hit rates, and Max plan consumption analyzer. /cc-tokenomics dashboard + reference docs on rate limits, cache lifecycle, and empirical billing experiments. Claude Code only.

plugins.name: cc-cache-keepalive
plugins.description: Keeps Claude Code's prompt cache warm on Max plans via a SessionStart-scheduled silent cron. Opt-in via ~/.cc-cache-keepalive flag file. Cron prompt is sentinel 'cc-cache-keepalive' — gate Stop hooks on it to silence turn-end sounds. Claude Code only (hook + cron).

plugins.name: cc-usage-guard
plugins.description: Pause-at-limit guard for Claude Code. A statusLine sensor records 5h + weekly rate-limit usage; PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit hooks watch it in two tiers — a soft WARN nudge on approach, then a hard PARK that injects a STOP, schedules a one-shot CronCreate auto-resume at reset, and fires a PushNotification. Per-window thresholds; subagents and teammates (any nesting depth) wind down and return instead of parking; debounced per session and per spawned agent. Claude Code only (statusLine + hooks).

plugins.name: prep-compact
plugins.description: Audit in-flight state before any context-compacting step; produce a copy-paste /compact message plus a queue-able follow-up that chains the next action when compact finishes. Portable across Agent Skills hosts — compacting is a general concept, not Claude-specific.

plugins.name: prep-goal
plugins.description: Interrogate a rough objective into a tight, verifiable /goal completion condition before handing it to an autonomous goal loop. Grills one question at a time to pin the real end-state, the gate (a runnable check whose raw output the loop pastes), a scope fence, the forbidden cheat, and guardrails (turn cap + credential liveness), then emits a short paste-ready /goal line. Pass --delegate to emit a goal that runs each iteration in a fresh implement subagent so a long run's context grows slowly. Built for Claude Code's native /goal; the technique ports to any autonomous-loop host.

plugins.name: humanize
plugins.description: Strip AI-writing tells from text. Detects em-dash overuse, AI vocabulary, inflated significance, rule-of-three, sycophancy, and 20+ more patterns. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: loop-finder
plugins.description: Loop discovery + race + feature-driven iteration. Two skills: loop-finder (engineers a self-verifiable gate for a task class, races parallel variants, converges on the best loop config; HITL concentrated at permission boundaries) and feature-cycle (outer queued-fix chain that ships features against the converged gate, retros pain, queues one harness fix per cycle — Karpathy autoresearch discipline applied to dev experience).

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Design-before-code gate. Explores intent, proposes 2-3 approaches, presents a design, and gets approval before any implementation. Use before creating features, building components, adding functionality, or changing behavior. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: systematic-debugging
plugins.description: Four-phase debugging discipline (root-cause investigation, pattern analysis, hypothesis, single-fix implementation). No fixes before investigation; 3+ failed fixes means stop and question the architecture. Use on a reproducible bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior in code you can run and inspect directly, before proposing fixes; for an incident reported across runtime systems with possibly-unreachable evidence, use the investigate skill instead. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: skill-smith
plugins.description: Forge for Agent Skills: create, test, evaluate, optimize triggering, and package skills. Merges an empirical eval loop (run with-skill vs baseline, benchmark, iterate) with TDD-for-skills discipline (baseline-test first, close rationalization loopholes). Bundles the eval harness, benchmark viewer, description-triggering optimizer, and a design-vocabulary reference (predictability, context vs cognitive load, information hierarchy, leading words, failure modes). Claude-Code-leaning (subagents + scripts).

plugins.name: git-cleanup
plugins.description: Clean up stale git branches and worktrees. Finds branches merged into dev/develop/master/main, checks worktrees for uncommitted changes, removes what's safe while skipping dirty worktrees. Use for 'clean up branches', 'git housekeeping', 'remove merged branches', 'clean worktrees'. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: strip-migration-cruft
plugins.description: Scan a repo for transitional / migration / phase / wave / story / legacy-alias cruft comments, bucket into safe-to-strip vs keep-semantic, propose surgical edits and execute after confirmation. Use for 'scan for migration comments', 'remove phase/wave/story refs', 'strip transitional cruft'. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: grilling
plugins.description: Relentless one-question-at-a-time interview that stress-tests a plan or design to convergence, exploring the codebase to answer its own questions where it can. Bundles grilling (the engine), grill-with-docs (grill + write ADRs and a glossary as you go), and domain-modeling (sharpen a ubiquitous language, CONTEXT.md glossary, sparing ADRs). Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: teach
plugins.description: Stateful, multi-session teaching workspace: grounds every lesson in a MISSION.md, gathers trusted RESOURCES.md, produces short self-contained HTML lessons in the learner's zone of proximal development, tracks progress via learning-records, and builds storage strength through retrieval, spacing, and interleaving. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.

plugins.name: codebase-design
plugins.description: Shared vocabulary for designing deep modules: a lot of behaviour behind a small interface, placed at a clean seam, testable through that interface. Precise glossary (module, interface, implementation, depth, seam, adapter, leverage, locality), the deletion test, the one-adapter-vs-two seam rule, and testability checks. Bundles DEEPENING.md and DESIGN-IT-TWICE.md. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.
